MATCH (s:Station) RETURN s
MATCH (s:Station {name: 'Central Station'}) RETURN s
MATCH (p:Passenger {id: 'P12345'}) SET p.email = 'new.email@example.com' RETURN p
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.timestamp < date('2023-01-01') DELETE m
MATCH (t:Train) RETURN count(t) AS trainCount
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station {name: 'Central Station'}) RETURN t
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.id = 'J567' RETURN p
MATCH (s:Station) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)<-[:LOCATED_AT]-(p:Platform) RETURN s.name, collect(p.number) AS platforms
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) RETURN r.name, count(i) AS incidentCount
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:AT]-(d:DailyPassengerLog) RETURN s.name, sum(d.count) AS totalPassengers ORDER BY totalPassengers DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH p = shortestPath((a:Station {name: 'Central Station'})-[:CONNECTED*]-(b:Station {name: 'Airport'})) RETURN p
MATCH (j:Journey) RETURN j, [(j)-[:USES]->(t:Train) | t] AS trains, [(j)-[:HAS_TICKET]->(tk:Ticket) | tk] AS tickets
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.departureTime > datetime() - duration('P7D') RETURN j
MATCH (j:Journey {status: 'cancelled'})-[:HAS_TICKET]->(t:Ticket) SET t.status = 'refunded' RETURN t
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey) WITH p, count(DISTINCT j) AS journeyCount WHERE journeyCount > 10 RETURN p
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (s)-[:HAS_DEPOT]->(:Depot) } RETURN s
MATCH (s:StaffMember)-[:WORKS_ON]->(t:Train)-[:INVOLVED_IN]->(i:Incident) RETURN s.name, i.description
MATCH (r:Route)<-[:PART_OF]-(j:Journey)<-[:FOR]-(t:Ticket)-[:SOLD_BY]->(s:TicketSalesSummary) RETURN r.name, sum(s.totalAmount) AS totalSales ORDER BY totalSales DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (s:Station {name: 'Central Station'})<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) RETURN s.name AS location, 'Incident' AS type, i.description AS details UNION MATCH (s:Station {name: 'Central Station'})<-[:AT]-(m:MaintenanceLog) RETURN s.name AS location, 'Maintenance' AS type, m.description AS details
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:PART_OF]->(r:Route) WITH p, sum(r.distance) AS totalDistance RETURN p.name, totalDistance ORDER BY totalDistance DESC
MATCH (t:Train) RETURN t.id, t.status
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.city = 'London' RETURN s.name
MATCH (p:Platform) WHERE p.number = 3 SET p.status = 'under_maintenance' RETURN p
MATCH (d:Depot) WHERE d.capacity < 10 DELETE d
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.departureTime > datetime() RETURN j
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) RETURN p.name, count(t) AS ticketsBought ORDER BY ticketsBought DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (r:Route)-[:INCLUDES]->(s:Station) RETURN r.name, collect(s.name) AS stations
MATCH (t:Train)-[:MAINTENANCE_AT]->(d:Depot) RETURN t.id, d.name
MATCH (s:StaffMember)-[:WORKS_FOR]->(:Depot) RETURN s.name, s.role
MATCH (i:Incident) WHERE i.severity = 'high' AND i.status = 'open' RETURN i
MATCH (t:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.status = 'delayed' SET t.refundEligible = true RETURN t
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(c:TravelCard) RETURN p.name, c.cardType, c.balance
MATCH (l:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE l.date = date('2025-03-24') RETURN l.stationId, l.count
MATCH (s:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE s.date > date('2025-01-01') RETURN s.stationId, sum(s.amount) AS total
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE s.name = 'Central' RETURN t.id, collect(s.time) AS times
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:USES]->(t:Train) WHERE t.model = 'Express' RETURN j.id, j.departureTime
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:ON]->(r:Route) WITH p, r, count(j) AS trips RETURN p.name, r.name, trips
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.completed = false AND m.scheduledDate < date() SET m.overdue = true RETURN m
MATCH (s:Station)-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(p:Platform) OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_INCIDENT]->(i:Incident) RETURN s.name, p.number, i
MATCH p = allShortestPaths((a:Station {id: 'S1'})-[:CONNECTED_TO*]-(b:Station {id: 'S2'})) RETURN p
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.maintenanceDue < date() AND t.status = 'active' SET t.status = 'maintenance_required' RETURN t
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.price > 50 WITH p, sum(t.price) AS totalSpent RETURN p.name, totalSpent ORDER BY totalSpent DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.status IN ['delayed', 'cancelled'] AND j.departureTime > datetime() - duration('P1D') RETURN j
MATCH (s:StaffMember)-[:MANAGES]->(d:Depot) WITH s, d WHERE d.capacity > 100 RETURN s.name
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WITH r.name AS routeName, count(i) AS incidents WHERE incidents > 3 RETURN routeName, incidents
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(c:TravelCard) WHERE c.expiryDate < date() SET c.status = 'expired' RETURN c
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:HAS_TICKET]->(t:Ticket) WITH j, count(t) AS ticketsSold WHERE ticketsSold > 200 RETURN j
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (s)-[:HAS_INCIDENT]->(i:Incident) WHERE i.severity = 'critical' } RETURN s.name
MATCH (d:Depot)-[:SERVICES]->(t:Train) RETURN d.name, collect(t.id) AS trainsServiced
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog)-[:PERFORMED_BY]->(s:StaffMember) RETURN m.id, s.name, m.duration
MATCH (r:Route) OPTIONAL MATCH (r)<-[:PART_OF]-(j:Journey) RETURN r.name, count(j) AS journeys
MATCH (t:Train) RETURN t.id, t.capacity, [ (t)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) | s.name ] AS stops
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WITH p, sum(t.price) AS total WHERE total > 1000 SET p.isPremium = true RETURN p
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:STARTS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN s.name, count(j) AS departures ORDER BY departures DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:DESTINATION]-(j:Journey) RETURN s.name, count(j) AS arrivals ORDER BY arrivals DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:USES]->(t:Train) WHERE t.id = 'T100' RETURN j ORDER BY j.departureTime DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (s:Station)-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(p:Platform) WITH s, count(p) AS platformCount WHERE platformCount < 2 SET s.smallStation = true RETURN s
MATCH (s:StaffMember)-[:INVOLVED_IN]->(i:Incident) WHERE i.date > date() - duration('P30D') RETURN s.name, count(i) AS incidents ORDER BY incidents DESC
MATCH (t:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.departureTime > datetime() DELETE t
MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(:Ticket) } DELETE p
MATCH (s:Station) RETURN s.name, s.city ORDER BY s.name
MATCH (p:Platform) WHERE p.platformNumber = 1 RETURN p
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.status = 'out_of_service' SET t.status = 'decommissioned' RETURN t
MATCH (d:Depot) WHERE d.location = 'North Yard' DELETE d
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.departureTime < datetime() - duration('P1Y') RETURN j
MATCH (t:Ticket) WHERE t.price > 100 RETURN t.ticketId, t.price
MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.loyaltyPoints > 5000 SET p.tier = 'platinum' RETURN p
MATCH (c:TravelCard) WHERE c.balance < 10 SET c.status = 'low_balance' RETURN c
MATCH (l:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE l.date = date('2025-03-24') RETURN l.stationId, l.entryCount, l.exitCount
MATCH (s:TicketSalesSummary)-[:AT_STATION]->(st:Station) RETURN st.name, s.totalRevenue, s.ticketCount
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.priority = 'high' AND m.status <> 'completed' RETURN m
MATCH (i:Incident) WHERE i.reportedAt > datetime() - duration('PT24H') RETURN i
MATCH (r:Route)-[:CONTAINS_STATION]->(s:Station) RETURN r.id, count(s) AS stationCount
MATCH (t:Train)-[:SCHEDULED_ON]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.date = date('2025-12-25') RETURN t
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.purchaseDate > date('2025-03-01') RETURN p.name, count(t) AS recentTickets
MATCH (s:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(t:Train) RETURN s.name, t.id
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.capacityUsed > j.capacity * 0.9 SET j.overcrowded = true RETURN j
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (s)-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(p:Platform) WHERE p.status = 'closed' } RETURN s.name
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(j:Journey) RETURN i.id, collect(j.id) AS affectedJourneys
MATCH p = (s:Station {name: 'Grand Central'})-[:CONNECTED_TO*1..3]-(other:Station) RETURN p LIMIT 20
MATCH (t:Train)-[:PERFORMS]->(j:Journey) WITH t, count(j) AS journeys WHERE journeys > 5 RETURN t.id
MATCH (d:Depot)<-[:STORED_AT]-(t:Train) WHERE t.status = 'active' RETURN d.name, count(t) AS activeTrains
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:STARTS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH s, count(j) AS departures WHERE departures > 100 RETURN s.name, departures
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(c:TravelCard) WITH p, sum(c.balance) AS totalBalance WHERE totalBalance > 500 RETURN p.name
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog)-[:PERFORMED_ON]->(t:Train) WHERE t.model = 'Electric' RETURN m
MATCH (t:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.status = 'cancelled' DELETE t
MATCH (s:StaffMember) WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (s)-[:WORKS_AT]->(:Depot) } DELETE s
MATCH (l:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE l.date = date() - duration('P7D') RETURN l.stationId, avg(l.count) AS avgDaily
MATCH (s:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE s.date >= date('2025-01-01') AND s.date <= date('2025-03-31') RETURN sum(s.amount) AS q1Revenue
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN t.id, s.name, collect(t.arrivalTime) AS arrivalTimes
MATCH (i:Incident) WHERE i.severity IN ['high', 'critical'] AND i.status = 'resolved' RETURN i
MATCH (r:Route) WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (r)<-[:PART_OF]-(j:Journey) } DELETE r
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.travelDate > date() RETURN p.name, count(t) AS futureTrips
MATCH (c:TravelCard)-[:USED_ON]->(j:Journey) RETURN c.cardId, count(j) AS trips ORDER BY trips DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:DESTINATION]-(j:Journey)-[:STARTS_AT]->(origin:Station) RETURN origin.name AS origin, s.name AS destination, count(j) AS journeyCount
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog)-[:PERFORMED_BY]->(s:StaffMember) WHERE m.duration > 120 RETURN s.name, avg(m.duration) AS avgDuration
MATCH (t:Train)-[:MAINTENANCE_AT]->(d:Depot) WHERE d.capacity > 50 RETURN t.id, d.name ORDER BY t.id
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.departureTime > datetime() AND j.departureTime < datetime() + duration('P3D') RETURN j
MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(:Journey {status: 'delayed'}) } RETURN p.name, p.contact
MATCH (s:Station)-[r:HAS_PLATFORM]->(p:Platform) SET r.capacity = 200 RETURN s.name, p.number, r.capacity
